case_title: VLAHOS, JOHN B. et al vs. HISCOX, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. VOZIKES, YOTA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-17-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-23-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. VOZIKES, YOTA AS TO DEFENDANT HISCOX, JAMES DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HISCOX, JAMES

ROOM 220, JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK 2:19 PM C/C FOR SETT. CONF, PLTF. PRESENT W/O HIS ATTY, DEFT PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS AS FOLLOWS STIP JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSS OF THE PREM AT 1288 MISSION ST, #402, SF, CA, MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $1050 PLUS $215 COSTS, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO PHYSICAL EVICTION PRIOR TO 9/30/98. SHOULD DEFT PAY TO PLTF. $500 BY 9/29/98, PLTF WILL GIVE DEFT AN ADDNL 12 DAYS OF POSS, IF DEFT PAYS PLTF. $500 BY 10/13/98, PLTF. WILL GIVE ADDITIONAL 14 DAYS OF POSS TO DEFT. AND IF DEFT PAYS $500 BY 10/27/98 AND PAYS ALL, PLTF TO DISMISS ACTION. DEFT TO BRING ALL ARREAGES BY 11/98. DEFT HEARD AND AGREED TO THE TERMS. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.42 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. VOZIKES, YOTA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HISCOX, JAMES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HISCOX, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, #402, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,150.00 RENT, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,365.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-29-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER STAY INFORMATION.
